code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut cur_len = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if cur_len > best_len
        best = current
        best_len = cur_len
      end
      current = ""
      cur_len = 0
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        cur_len = cur_len + 1
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("longest=#{best}")
when None
  print("longest=")
end
